proposed_hypotheses.text: Stage IV disease (stage_iv=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage IV.
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS 3.703 mo (stage IV, n=27481) vs 5.055 mo (non-stage IV, n=22519); diff=-1.352 mo; Welch p=<1e-300.
OLS slope of PFS on ECOG: -1.190 months per unit; p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Right-sided primary tumors (right_sided_primary=1) have shorter pfs_months than left-sided primaries.
Mean pfs_months differs between female (sex_female=1) and male patients.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by right_sided_primary
analyses.result_summary: PFS 4.114 mo right-sided vs 4.419 mo left-sided; diff=-0.305; p=1.04e-49.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by sex_female
analyses.result_summary: PFS difference female−male = -0.006 mo; p=0.7703.

proposed_hypotheses.text: KRAS-mutant (kras_mutation=1) tumors have shorter pfs_months than KRAS wild-type.
NRAS-mutant (nras_mutation=1) tumors have different pfs_months versus NRAS wild-type.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by kras_mutation
analyses.result_summary: PFS 4.121 mo (KRAS-mut) vs 4.448 (WT); diff=-0.327; p=1.86e-58.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by nras_mutation
analyses.result_summary: PFS difference NRAS-mut − WT = 0.221 mo; p=7.31e-04.

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRAF V600E-mutant tumors have shorter pfs_months than BRAF wild-type.
MSI-high tumors (msi_high=1) have different pfs_months than microsatellite-stable.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by braf_v600e
Welch t-test on pfs_months by msi_high

proposed_hypotheses.text: HER2-amplified tumors have different pfs_months than HER2-non-amplified.
NTRK-fusion-positive tumors have different pfs_months than fusion-negative.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by her2_amplified
analyses.result_summary: PFS difference HER2-amp − non = -0.056 mo; p=0.3603.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by ntrk_fusion
analyses.result_summary: PFS difference NTRK-fusion − non = 0.040 mo (n_pos=251); p=0.7862.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab have different pfs_months than those who do not (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab have different pfs_months than those who do not (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib have longer pfs_months than those who do not.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by treatment_cetuximab
analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab vs no cetuximab PFS diff = -0.038 mo; p=0.0880.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by treatment_bevacizumab
analyses.result_summary: Bevacizumab vs no bevacizumab PFS diff = -0.019 mo; p=0.3544.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by treatment_regorafenib
analyses.result_summary: Regorafenib 5.089 vs 4.117; diff=0.972; p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different pfs_months than those who do not (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib have different pfs_months than those who do not (unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib have different pfs_months than those who do not (unadjusted).

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by treatment_pembrolizumab
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab vs no pembrolizumab PFS diff = 0.005 mo; p=0.8557.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by treatment_encorafenib
analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib vs no encorafenib PFS diff = 0.005 mo; p=0.8725.

analyses.code: Welch t-test on pfs_months by treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib
analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab/tucatinib vs none PFS diff = -0.044 mo; p=0.2435.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit (positive PFS effect) is restricted to KRAS wild-type tumors and absent or harmful in KRAS-mutant tumors.
Within KRAS wild-type patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta (cetux×KRAS) = 0.020; main cetux beta in KRAS-WT = -0.048; interaction p=0.6649.

analyses.code: Welch t-test cetuximab vs no cetuximab within kras_mutation==0
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS-WT (n=29102): cetuximab PFS 4.415 vs control 4.463; diff=-0.048; p=0.1215.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within RAS/BRAF wild-type (kras_mutation=0, nras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0) tumors, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within left-sided RAS/BRAF wild-type tumors, treatment_cetuximab is associated with even longer pfs_months than in the overall RAS/BRAF wild-type group.

analyses.code: Welch t-test cetuximab vs control in RAS/BRAF WT subset
analyses.result_summary: RAS/BRAF-WT (n=25324): cetuximab 4.444 vs 4.489; diff=-0.045; p=0.1704.

analyses.code: Welch t-test in left-sided RAS/BRAF WT
analyses.result_summary: Left-sided RAS/BRAF-WT (n=16443): cetuximab 4.617 vs 4.684; diff=-0.067; p=0.1246.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction on pfs_months: pembrolizumab benefit is concentrated in MSI-high patients.
Within MSI-high patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta (pembro×MSI) = 0.002; p=0.9879.

analyses.code: Welch t-test in MSI-H subset by treatment_pembrolizumab

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_encorafenib × braf_v600e interaction on pfs_months: encorafenib benefit is concentrated in BRAF V600E-mutant tumors.
Within BRAF V600E patients, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta (encora×BRAF) = -0.141; p=0.3762.

analyses.code: Welch t-test in BRAF V600E subset by treatment_encorafenib

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified interaction on pfs_months: trastuzumab/tucatinib benefit is concentrated in HER2-amplified tumors.
Within HER2-amplified patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta (T/T×HER2) = 0.063; p=0.7778.

analyses.code: Welch t-test in HER2-amp subset by treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Albumin slope = 0.465 months/(g/dL); p=3.25e-115.
LDH slope = -0.00032 months per U/L; p=0.0126.
CEA slope = -0.00535 months per ng/mL; p=3.13e-17.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: NLR slope = 0.0052 months per unit; p=0.2896.
CRP slope = -0.00202 months per mg/L; p=0.0650.
Weight-loss slope = -0.0730 months per % loss; p=2.21e-167.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with adrenal_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with pleural_effusion=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with pericardial_effusion=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: liver_mets: PFS difference (pos − neg) = -0.019 mo; p=0.5189.
bone_mets: PFS difference (pos − neg) = 0.031 mo; p=0.2248.
adrenal_mets: PFS difference (pos − neg) = 0.058 mo; p=0.0888.
pleural_effusion: PFS difference (pos − neg) = -0.052 mo; p=0.0688.
pericardial_effusion: PFS difference (pos − neg) = -0.079 mo; p=0.1190.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher cough_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: fatigue_grade slope = -0.0017 months per unit; p=0.8530.
pain_nrs slope = -0.0023 months per unit; p=0.5467.
dyspnea_grade slope = -0.0092 months per unit; p=0.3116.
cough_grade slope = -0.0161 months per unit; p=0.0867.
appetite_loss_grade slope = -0.0002 months per unit; p=0.9830.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with hypertension=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with copd=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with coronary_artery_disease=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with atrial_fibrillation=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with venous_thromboembolism_history=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with autoimmune_disease=1 have different pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: diabetes_mellitus: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.013 mo; p=0.6114.
hypertension: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.015 mo; p=0.4634.
copd: PFS diff (pos − neg) = 0.005 mo; p=0.8107.
chronic_kidney_disease: PFS diff (pos − neg) = 0.032 mo; p=0.3144.
heart_failure: PFS diff (pos − neg) = 0.001 mo; p=0.9824.
coronary_artery_disease: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.003 mo; p=0.9239.
atrial_fibrillation: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.059 mo; p=0.1158.
venous_thromboembolism_history: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.014 mo; p=0.7454.
autoimmune_disease: PFS diff (pos − neg) = 0.037 mo; p=0.4208.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have different pfs_months than urban.
Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.

analyses.result_summary: Age slope = 0.17650 months/year; p=<1e-300.
Smoking slope = 0.00005 months/pack-year; p=0.9132.
Rural − urban PFS diff = 0.024 mo; p=0.3388.
Overall ANOVA across race_ethnicity: F=0.872, p=0.4795.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with pten_loss=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with cdkn2a_loss=1 have different pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: tp53_mutation: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.018 mo; p=0.3751.
pik3ca_mutation: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.024 mo; p=0.5283.
pten_loss: PFS diff (pos − neg) = -0.014 mo; p=0.7592.
cdkn2a_loss: PFS diff (pos − neg) = 0.021 mo; p=0.4624.

proposed_hypotheses.text: More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with prior_radiation=1 have different pfs_months than those without.
Patients with prior_surgery=1 have different pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: Prior-lines slope = 0.0078 months/line; p=0.3875.
Prior-chemo PFS diff = -0.005 mo; p=0.8197.
Prior-radiation PFS diff = 0.023 mo; p=0.2974.
Prior-surgery PFS diff = -0.023 mo; p=0.2773.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 27 germline SNPs in the panel has a Bonferroni-significant additive association with pfs_months.
The top SNP by p-value, snp_rs1050828, has a non-zero additive effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ snp_*; sort p; count p < 0.05/k
analyses.result_summary: Of 27 SNPs, 0 reached Bonferroni-significance at α/k=1.85e-03. Top three by p: snp_rs1050828 β=0.092 p=0.0153; snp_rs1801131 β=-0.049 p=0.0274; snp_rs1801197 β=-0.049 p=0.0472.
snp_rs1050828: additive β=0.0917 months per allele; p=0.0153.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within RAS/BRAF wild-type, the treatment_cetuximab × right_sided_primary interaction on pfs_months is non-zero: cetuximab benefit is smaller (or absent) in right-sided versus left-sided primaries.
Within right-sided RAS/BRAF wild-type tumors, treatment_cetuximab is associated with little or no PFS benefit compared to controls.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta (cetux × right) in RAS/BRAF-WT = 0.041; p=0.5619.

analyses.code: Welch t-test cetuximab vs control in right-sided RAS/BRAF-WT
analyses.result_summary: Right-sided RAS/BRAF-WT (n=8881): cetux 4.109 vs 4.135; diff=-0.026; p=0.5864.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within stage IV patients, treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no bevacizumab.
There is a treatment_bevacizumab × stage_iv interaction on pfs_months (bevacizumab effect differs between stage IV and non-stage-IV).

analyses.code: Welch t-test bev vs control within stage_iv==1

analyses.result_summary: Interaction beta (bev × stage_iv) = -0.004; p=0.9285.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment, stage_iv remains independently associated with shorter pfs_months and albumin_g_dl with longer pfs_months.

After multivariable adjustment, the treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation, treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high, treatment_encorafenib × braf_v600e, and treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified interactions remain on pfs_months.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS, see formula in iteration 24 of analysis_summary.txt
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS R²=0.859. stage_iv β=-1.362 (p=<1e-300); albumin_g_dl β=0.469 (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib remains associated with longer pfs_months after adjusting for stage_iv, ecog_ps, prior_lines_of_therapy, and albumin_g_dl.
There is a treatment_regorafenib × prior_lines_of_therapy interaction on pfs_months (regorafenib effect varies with the number of prior lines).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ regorafenib + stage_iv + ecog_ps + prior_lines + albumin
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted regorafenib β = 0.967 mo (p=<1e-300).
Interaction beta (regora × prior_lines) = 0.016; p=0.4766; main regora β at zero prior lines = 0.952.
